title: pterocarpus ecastaphyllum
intro: Pterocarpus ecastaphyllum, also known as Pterocarpus marsupium, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pterocarpus ecastaphyllum include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the bark of the tree is commonly used to make a decoction or infusion, which is often used to treat various health conditions, including diabetes and digestive problems.
